target_phenotype: Protein-protein interaction neighborhoods — proteins co-purified with a bait define a functional complex or proximity network
cell_line_or_system: HEK293 or relevant cell line (Schaffer et al. 2025)

readout.measurement: Biotinylated proximal proteins identified by mass spectrometry
readout.primary_metric: Enrichment of proximal proteins relative to control — clusters represent groups of proteins with shared proximity profiles

clustering.method: Unsupervised clustering of protein proximity profiles across multiple baits

provenance.citation: Schaffer et al. (2025) — proximity proteomics dataset
provenance.data_source: schaffer_2025.csv — gene-level cluster assignments from proximity proteomics

notes: Clusters represent groups of proteins with similar proximity labeling profiles. Genes in the same cluster likely co-localize or participate in the same complex or process.
